'''Leela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Witches of Dathomir|Witch]] who worked as a [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] to the clan leader [[Zalem/Legends|Zalem]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. When she and two others found out [[Ros Lai]]'s true identity in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Leela asked Lai to forgive her. Lai did so, but later [[Death/Legends|killed]] her.
